nasb.text: But Joshua the son of Nun and Caleb the son of Jephunneh remained alive out of those men who went to spy out the land.

esv.text: Of those men who went to spy out the land, only Joshua the son of Nun and Caleb the son of Jephunneh remained alive.

cnv.text: 在那些去窺探那地的人之中，只有嫩的兒子約書亞和耶孚尼的兒子迦勒，仍然活著。

ccb.text: 只有嫩的儿子约书亚和耶孚尼的儿子迦勒得以幸免。
